docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-21-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR CHANGE OF NAME. PETITIONER ADIN ROSENHAUS HORAN WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED. THE COURT GRANTS DECREE CHANGING PETITIONER'S NAME TO ADIN SAMSON ROSENHAUS. DECREE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: KAREN FARNSWORTH, #5162. (503)
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER ROSENHAUS, AMY B HORAN, PETER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECREE CHANGING NAME TO ADIN SAMSON ROSENHAUS-HORAN FILED BY MINOR ROSENHAUS, AMY B HORAN, ADIN ROSENHAUS HORAN, PETER
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER ROSENHAUS, AMY B HORAN, PETER HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-21-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for change of name.. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: V. Mu; Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, #5162. Petitioner Adin Rosenhaus Horan was sworn and examined. The Court grants Decree changing Petitioner's name to Adin Samson Rosenhaus. Decree signed and filed in open court. (503)
